label: Pawn group maker
description: Defines a pawn group template - a set of weighted PawnKindDef options used to populate raids, settlements, trader caravans, and other groups for a faction.

kindDef.label: Kind def
kindDef.description: PawnGroupKindDef that controls which generator worker this group maker uses (e.g. Combat, Trader, Settlement).

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for selecting this group maker when multiple group makers share the same kindDef.

disallowedStrategies.label: Disallowed strategies
disallowedStrategies.description: RaidStrategyDefs that cannot use this group maker. Used to prevent certain pawn mixes from appearing in incompatible strategies such as Siege.

maxTotalPoints.label: Max total points
maxTotalPoints.description: Maximum combined combat points this group maker can be selected for. Group makers with a low cap appear only in small raids.

options.label: Options
options.description: Combat or general pawn options. Child element names are PawnKindDef defNames; text is the float selection weight.

traders.label: Traders
traders.description: Trader pawn options for Trader-kind group makers. Child element names are PawnKindDef defNames; text is the float selection weight.

carriers.label: Carriers
carriers.description: Pack animal or carrier pawn options for Trader-kind group makers. Child element names are PawnKindDef defNames; text is the float selection weight.

guards.label: Guards
guards.description: Guard pawn options for Trader-kind group makers. Child element names are PawnKindDef defNames; text is the float selection weight.
